name: Who pays if the at-fault driver in construction zone had no insurance near Salt Lake?
description: Your UM insurance or sue driver; comp backup.

mainEntity.name: Who pays if the at-fault driver in construction zone had no insurance near Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Your UM insurance or sue driver; comp backup.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Your uninsured motorist coverage or workers' comp first; sue the driver personally if viable.** Third-party claim possible[2]. **Key factors:** 1. UM policy check. 2. Driver assets/judgment. 3. Comp as safety net. 4. Utah minimums low. Notify your insurer immediately. Lawyer pursues all angles including site negligence.
